scenarios.task: Write a review artifact with one card, one list, one tabs or accordion block, and one field or option block.
hard_requirements: Includes one of tabs or accordion
Includes one of radio-group, toggle-group, select, combobox, input, textarea, checkbox, switch, slider
Does not use class, className, style, scripts, event handlers, raw HTML, shadcn props, Radix props, or unknown attrs

scenarios.task: Write a decision artifact with one card, one table, and one alert.
Write a structured handoff artifact with one card, one accordion or tabs block, and at least one select-like control.
hard_requirements: Includes one of tabs or accordion
Includes one of select or combobox or radio-group or toggle-group

scenarios.task: Install ahtml for a normal user environment.
hard_requirements: Does not use removed scaffold/init flows

scenarios.task: Set up ahtml from a local repository checkout for development.
hard_requirements: Uses npm install and npm link or equivalent local-dev setup
Does not claim the current project is the runtime target

scenarios.task: Prepare an isolated runtime with AHTML_HOME and non-interactive setup.
Read the public contract, write an artifact, and build it.
Preview an artifact locally and explain when inspect is needed.
hard_requirements: Uses inspect only when task needs document or artifact details

scenarios.task: Given an existing artifact file, validate the shape by using prompt, build or preview, and inspect if needed.

hard_requirements: Uses ahtml build as the rebuild step
Starts with ahtml doctor or explicit build check
Checks build before changing preview logic
Uses preview --port 0 when diagnosing port conflicts

scenarios.task: A local runtime issue remains reproducible after normal repair steps.
hard_requirements: Escalates to bug reporting when the issue remains reproducible
